decisions.decision: use PostToolUse hooks instead of MCP for agent communication
decisions.rationale: MCP failed to load on PC Home (openclaude proxy). Hooks already work on both PCs via GSD.

decisions.decision: HTTP API on port 3334 for hook polling
decisions.rationale: hooks have 5s timeout, HTTP GET is faster and simpler than WebSocket connect/disconnect
each agent only gets unread messages, no duplicates

decisions.decision: commit format: type: lowercase message, no scopes
decisions.rationale: user preference for clean git log
